name: Union Trade Arbitration Guild
summary: Institutional dispute-resolution body helping keep trade agreements moving across the Union network.
day_to_day: Mediates contracts, hears merchant disputes, and drafts settlements.
who_works_there: Arbiters, mediators, contract scribes, witness clerks.
who_uses_it: Merchants, caravans, guilds, houses needing commercial settlement.
authority: Can issue binding trade settlements under Union rules.
public_manifestation: Crowded hearing rooms, witness benches, sealed settlements, angry merchants pretending calm.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Speed is valued, but rushed settlements create long-tail resentment and reputational harm.
